{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322085319AB22C28B7C8FD13C0AA0"}"},"total":754},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7219930985864446731","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我个人认为这本书基本上算是番茄中最好的国运竟斗小说之一。对历史人物的联动，介绍，历史事件的融合，观者的话语都写得非常好。本书文笔流畅，情节安排上，引人入胜，让人身临其境值得细细品味的一本书。如果不烂尾的话，这本书至少是个9.5分的作品了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681021293,"group_id":"7195087109852499003","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"本人大学（已开学）软件暂时已删","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N849L1JZVGiomTTT6Lf7QBVaDuJCNhA0YUmOh2aOeDC4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/401e2f599c5840eda98b8a7d9d702a3a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703397&x-signature=lyIf%2FNSQsEb0KQkQjQtDdVkG1Fs%3D","user_id":"1407027395180183","user_name":"爱吃芥末大虾的呼元蝶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1407027395180183","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1656501726,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7195087109852499003","book_info":{"abstract":"在姜子凡穿越的平行世界，【国运竞斗】降临。
被选中者将投掷六面骰，抽取本国历史名将与敌国对弈。
这个世界的华国因7连败被罚，国民历史记忆断层。
当他决心赢回国史之时，政哥送来外挂:
“叮~恭喜获得ss天赋【运气主宰】，
你将主宰一切运气，随心所欲指定抽取名将！”
脚盆国嚣张来战：
“华国有名将？来给我们丰臣秀吉送人头的吧？”
“戚继光将军，这些倭寇，够戚家军塞牙缝不？”
在白鹰、天竺、高卢等国的震惊中，姜子凡携手涵盖全史的名将，有新时代学霸白起、抡语万物的夫子、八阵通天的孔明、狙法如神的张辽、遥遥领先的墨子……他们打脸各国、连克强敌，同时通关各种意难平副本，带领华国重回诸国之巅。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9ed14b62156c7b9546393e3f432daab5","author":"无声听惊雷","author_id":"","book_id":"7195087109852499003","book_name":"国运竞斗，我方名将场均专业对口","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7633人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":500,"name":"断层","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=500&name=断层&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7195113150172430863","read_count":"7633","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1059144"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"503","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,直播,国运,断层,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic-r/369bb7eb0172f644510d4075ae31ba17~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779324799&x-signature=SAhck%2FwlM4Z%2FrwaK2lvvG8um8Bc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id"
